headline: CarMax (NYSE:KMX) Delivers Impressive Q2 CY2026, Stock Soars
summary: Used automotive vehicle retailer Carmax (NYSE:KMX) reported Q2 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 6.2% year on year to $8.01 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.31 per share was 38.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: CarMax (NYSE:KMX) Delivers Impressive Q2 CY2026, Stock Soars
content.summary: Used automotive vehicle retailer Carmax (NYSE:KMX) reported Q2 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 6.2% year on year to $8.01 billion. Its GAAP profit of $1.31 per share was 38.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
